Concept Store  ·  Ibiza & Formentera

Who we are

A different kind of
shopping experience.

Blink is a concept store rooted in the spirit of the Balearic islands. We look at fashion through a Balearic point of view — sourcing exceptional independent brands that share our values of quality, craft, and natural materials.

From the finest cashmere and pure linen to handmade bags and semi-precious jewellery, every piece in our edit is chosen with intention. Two stores, one island soul — in Ibiza town and Sant Francesc, Formentera.

"Unique slow-fashion brands you won't
find anywhere else on
the island."

The Collection

Cashmere scarves & capes

Hand-finished cashmere pieces from small ateliers. Each piece is unique in weight and drape — woven from the softest superfine pure cashmere.
